ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was created */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the purchased items belong to */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used for the transaction */,
  "grand_total" REAL /* Total amount spent in the transaction */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES billing_addresses ("billing_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("shipping_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer signed up */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment method is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_items" (
  "transaction_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction item */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the transaction */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item has been returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address for shipping */,
  "city" TEXT /* City for shipping */,
  "state" TEXT /* State for shipping */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code for shipping */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country for shipping */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for shipping */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_addresses" (
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address for billing */,
  "city" TEXT /* City for billing */,
  "state" TEXT /* State for billing */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code for billing */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country for billing */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for billing */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default billing address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
